nodes.label: Content Brain
nodes.desc: A visible map of repeated ideas, source signals, content assets, gaps, and next deliverables.
actions: Turn one strong node into a public draft

nodes.label: Content Boundary
nodes.desc: The rules for what can be public, private, uncertain, or still a hypothesis.

nodes.label: Reusable Assets
nodes.desc: Existing posts, talks, notes, screenshots, and drafts that can become future material.
actions: Tag each asset with possible platforms

nodes.label: Current Gaps
nodes.desc: Important missing pieces that block the graph from becoming useful work.
actions: Choose one gap to close this week

nodes.label: Next Deliverables
nodes.desc: The posts, articles, courses, templates, skills, or reports that can come from graph nodes.

nodes.label: Public Signals
nodes.desc: Public observations from platforms, comments, benchmarks, and trend notes.
actions: Translate it into your own language

nodes.label: Chat Thread
nodes.desc: A source conversation that keeps producing repeated ideas.

nodes.label: Weekly Review
nodes.desc: A recurring report that names new signals, graph updates, gaps, and next actions.

nodes.label: Surprise Pool
nodes.desc: A place to collect useful non-obvious links between distant nodes.

nodes.label: Public Post
nodes.desc: A focused public explanation of one useful workflow insight.

nodes.label: Private Notes
nodes.desc: Sensitive source material that can inspire mechanisms without being published.

nodes.label: Comment Signal
nodes.desc: A repeated public question or objection that points to a content opportunity.

edges.label: surprise: private mechanism becomes public workflow
surprise: repeated chat becomes a connection pool
